programme.title: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Antarctica
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Another name will be added to the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup after the conclusion of the WPT L.A. Poker Classic Main Event, but first, a winner must be decided. Six remain from a field of 490 entrants and all will attempt to continue building a stack with their eye on the top prize of $1 Million Dollars.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Bala Patur leads the way, but former WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas is heating up and is now only behind by a small margin. In the middle of the pack sits 2 time WPT champion James Carroll who will be looking to outlast the two shorter stacks at the table while also giving himself a shot at what would be his third WPT title.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: We are down to four players at the final table of the WPT L.A. Poker Classic. WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas, who finished second in this event in 2019, is still in the hunt for the title. Also in the hunt, two-time WPT Champion James Carroll, chip leader Bala Patur, and Scott Hempel who with this final table finish will record his largest poker cash to date.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: WPT hits Hollywood, FL to host the Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown. This tournament drew a field of 2,482 entrants marking the largest field of any WPT event. The field has narrowed to the final six remaining players with first place receiving $1,260,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Sonny Franco has maintained the chip lead at this final table, but seasoned pro Brek Schutten is right on his heels. Also in the mix are Viet Vo, Steven Snyder, Albert Calderon, and Ken Aldridge as play gets back underway in Hollywood, Florida.

With blazing six-guns, quick-draw justice, and plenty of frontier grit, this action-packed adventure marks the beginning of the legendary Mesquiteers series.

programme.title: Show Me Milwaukee: Bike Racing and Community Building with a Milwaukee Courtroom Legend
programme.desc: Embark on an action-packed Milwaukee adventure with Judge Katie Kegel and Greg! Watch them build a bike, dig into a mission-driven community garden, cook authentic German dishes, and cheer on a thrilling pro bike race. Don't miss the excitement!

programme.title: Local Love: Social Media Influencer Looking to Turn Likes Into Love
programme.desc: Brendan, a security guard and social media influencer has found his way into the hearts of his social following. Now, three amazing women will look to turn hashtags into heartstrings.

programme.title: Bourbon Blaze: The Night That Tested America's Spirit
programme.desc: When a massive fire hits one of the nation’s largest bourbon distilleries, the families of competing bourbon companies have to decide whether to lend a hand… or let it burn. This is the story of bourbon, America’s native spirit.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: The Missing Link in the Mardi Gras Murders
programme.desc: The brutal murders of two trans women of color just 48 hours apart in New Orleans unsettle the community, leaving many wondering if the cases are connected. Detectives uncover clues, yet justice remains elusive.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: A Future Stolen: Finding Justice for Sade Robinson
